title: Transactional Outbox, Relay, Inbox, Sagas, and Compensation · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs transactional outbox, relay, inbox, sagas, and compensation from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the outbox, relay, inbox, and compensation protocol. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for outbox, relay, inbox, and compensation protocol after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Enumerate database-first, publish-first, timeout, crash, confirm-loss, rollback, and duplicate failure windows for a dual write.
Store domain mutation and immutable outbox message identity, type, payload, destination intent, and availability atomically.
Claim bounded outbox rows, publish with backpressure and confirms, mark completion safely, and recover ambiguous attempts through stable identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Dual Write Failure Matrix · changed case · Review Dual Write Failure Matrix
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 5991 in a high-volume telemetry route with one hot customer key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to close the local dual-write gap and preserve confirm or external-effect ambiguity; keep every queue and subscriber responsibility explicitly named; then fail the canary and prove older consumers remain compatible during rollback. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Enumerate database-first, publish-first, timeout, crash, confirm-loss, rollback, and duplicate failure windows for a dual write.

Which action demonstrates Dual Write Failure Matrix without dropping earlier contracts?
